item.title: Nedbank Wins Regulatory Approval To Take Majority Stake In Kenya’s NCBA
item.description: Nedbank is one step closer to acquiring 66% of Kenya’s NCBA, expanding East African footprint and fueling continental growth strategy. The post Nedban...

item.description: The NYSE is building a blockchain-powered platform for 24/7 trading and instant settlement of tokenized securities, aiming to modernize global capital...
